mapper.select: SELECT cs.*, c.name AS course_name, u.real_name AS student_name, u.username AS student_username FROM course_student cs LEFT JOIN course c ON cs.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN student u ON cs.student_id = u.id WHERE cs.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY cs.create_time DESC

SELECT cs.*, c.name AS course_name, u.real_name AS student_name, u.username AS student_username, t.real_name AS teacher_name FROM course_student cs LEFT JOIN course c ON cs.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN student u ON cs.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON c.teacher_id = t.id WHERE cs.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY cs.create_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM course_student WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
